name: Chu Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Chu Shogi (中将棋, 'middle shogi'): the classic 12x12 Japanese large-shogi variant from the 14th century -- 46 pieces a side of 21 types, no drops, and the famous double-moving Lion (double captures, igui capture-in-place, turn passes) protected by the traditional Lion-trading rules. Win by capturing ALL the opponent's royals (King, plus a Prince if a Drunk Elephant promoted); there is no check rule. Promotion in the far four ranks on entry or on a capture.
